checks.description: Ensure that boundary-value fetch inputs do not cause X or overflow in outputs.
checks.pass_condition: For fetch values at extremes (01 and 10) with data 0x00 or 0xFF, outputs remain defined (no X) and respect width constraints.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge_001 plan case is executed.

checks.description: Validate that after a legal fetch operation, the high bits (ins) and low bits (ad1) reflect the stored instruction without assuming a fixed latency.
checks.pass_condition: After applying fetch=01 with a data pattern, eventually ins and ad1 update to the high and low bits of the data, while ad2 remains unchanged, without requiring a specific cycle count.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic_001 plan case is executed.
